top_strength: Thorough probing on complex storage-to-condo move — nailed COI requirements, floor levels, storage fill percentage, condo move window restriction, and service elevator logistics.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass entirely absent, and all three differentiators were missed — these justify the price against cheaper competitors.
phone_presence_notes: Professional and gracious — especially the competitor referral — but never got the customer's name and kept a businesslike tone.
